Device.Name: ED6224 | 4-ch. com. interface, IO-Link, master, push-in
ED6224 | 4-K.-Kom.-Interface, IO-Link, Master, Push-in

SubItem.Name: State Ch1
SubItem.Comment: 0x_0 = Port disabled 0x_1 = Port in std dig in 0x_2 = Port in std dig out 0x_3 = Port in communikation OP 0x_4 = Port in communikation COMSTOP 0x1_ = Watchdog detected 0x2_ = internal Error 0x3_ = invalid Device ID 0x4_ = invalid Vendor ID 0x5_ = invalid IO-Link Version 0x6_ = invalid Frame Capability 0x7_ = invalid Cycle Time 0x8_ = invalid PD in length 0x9_ = invalid PD out length 0xA_ = no Device detected

SubItem.Name: State Ch2
SubItem.Comment: 0x_0 = Port disabled 0x_1 = Port in std dig in 0x_2 = Port in std dig out 0x_3 = Port in communikation OP 0x_4 = Port in communikation COMSTOP 0x1_ = Watchdog detected 0x2_ = internal Error 0x3_ = invalid Device ID 0x4_ = invalid Vendor ID 0x5_ = invalid IO-Link Version 0x6_ = invalid Frame Capability 0x7_ = invalid Cycle Time 0x8_ = invalid PD in length 0x9_ = invalid PD out length 0xA_ = no Device detected

SubItem.Name: State Ch3
SubItem.Comment: 0x_0 = Port disabled 0x_1 = Port in std dig in 0x_2 = Port in std dig out 0x_3 = Port in communikation OP 0x_4 = Port in communikation COMSTOP 0x1_ = Watchdog detected 0x2_ = internal Error 0x3_ = invalid Device ID 0x4_ = invalid Vendor ID 0x5_ = invalid IO-Link Version 0x6_ = invalid Frame Capability 0x7_ = invalid Cycle Time 0x8_ = invalid PD in length 0x9_ = invalid PD out length 0xA_ = no Device detected
